cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(minimal_intro)

# --- Standard (file-based) build ---
add_executable(minimal_intro
    main.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(minimal_intro PRIVATE
    rev_platform
    rev_shader
    rev_xm
)

if(MSVC)
    set_target_properties(minimal_intro PROPERTIES
        LINK_FLAGS_RELEASE "/SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS"
    )
endif()

# --- Packed (embedded assets) build ---
# packed_assets.h is generated by rev_pack into CMAKE_BINARY_DIR before this target is built.
add_executable(minimal_intro_packed
    main.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(minimal_intro_packed PRIVATE
    rev_platform
    rev_shader
    rev_xm
)

target_compile_definitions(minimal_intro_packed PRIVATE HIMYM_PACKED_ASSETS)

# Include CMAKE_BINARY_DIR so packed_assets.h and rev_pack.h can be found
target_include_directories(minimal_intro_packed PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/revision_libs/rev_pack/include
)

if(MSVC)
    set_target_properties(minimal_intro_packed PROPERTIES
        LINK_FLAGS_RELEASE "/SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS"
    )
endif()
